summary_log.topic: ATX Love + Lucas Hill grant opportunity
summary_log.notes: Identified Lucas B. Hill (UW-Madison) as university contact for grant-funded educational tech. Strategic alignment: ATX Love (nonprofit empowerment) + 8825 (AI infrastructure) + Lucas Hill (academic grant infrastructure). Added partnership details, grant strategy patterns, and next action items.

Established Phase 1 plan for 8825 agent architecture. TGIF = top priority test environment for Chat Mining Agent (meeting automation). RAL = governance tracking and post-vendor documentation. Deploying 3 agents: Chat Mining, Governance Tracker, Knowledge Retention. Mining Dropbox + Email to populate 8825 memory layer.
